_comment: Merge into ~/.claude/settings.json. The attention reflex: Claude Code lifecycle hooks dispatch an event into the pulse bar widget via `noctalia msg plugin lowcache/claude:pulse all <event>` (target `all` = every monitor's instance; `focused`/bare connector error when the widget is on multiple bars). The widget's onIpc(event, payload) maps the event to a glyph/color. Verified against noctalia 5.0.0 source. SessionStart resets to idle; the lifecycle drives turn_start -> tool_start -> turn_end. For the MCP shim (senses/hands), wire it separately via mcpServers/--mcp-config once shim/noctalia-mcp.py is in use.

hooks.command: noctalia msg plugin lowcache/claude:pulse all idle
noctalia msg plugin lowcache/claude:pulse all turn_start
noctalia msg plugin lowcache/claude:pulse all tool_start
noctalia msg plugin lowcache/claude:pulse all turn_start
noctalia msg plugin lowcache/claude:pulse all needs_attention
noctalia msg plugin lowcache/claude:pulse all turn_end
